overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character exploring ancient stone ruins on a bright sunny day. The character walks through an open plaza with a water feature, then enters a valley of rock formations approaching a distant obelisk and stone structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open archaeological plaza with water feature and distant obelisk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza toward distant rock formations and the obelisk

entered.detail: calm body of water reflecting the sky, bordered by stone edges
tall stone obelisk standing vertically against the horizon
weathered ancient stone wall partially covered in vegetation
large boulders and rock outcroppings scattered across the landscape
dense green trees forming the backdrop beyond the ruins

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a wide open archaeological plaza with a water pond on the left and ancient stone ruins in the distance. The ground is compacted earth, and a tall obelisk stands prominently against the blue sky ahead while scattered rock formations dot the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from plaza to rocky terrain

events.description: leaving the water feature behind as the terrain transitions to rocky landscape

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as large rock formations become prominent on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the water feature into a more arid area with large weathered rock formations appearing prominently on the right. The obelisk remains visible ahead, growing larger in the frame as the character approaches the rocky valley entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rock valley with towering stone formations

events.description: entering the valley between large weathered rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow valley between rock walls toward the obelisk and stone structure

entered.detail: ancient stone building with rectangular openings and weathered surfaces visible through the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character enters a valley flanked by tall, weathered rock formations that rise on both sides. An ancient stone structure with archways becomes visible ahead, while the obelisk towers in the background between the rocks, appearing closer than before.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between rock formations approaching stone structure

events.description: slight navigation adjustment to align with the passage between rock walls

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance of the stone structure through the narrow rock passage

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow passage between close rock walls, approaching the ancient stone structure. The obelisk appears smaller again in the distance as the character nears the building entrance, with the rock formations now towering immediately on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a wide, open archaeological plaza into a narrow, towering valley of ancient stone. It begins in a broad expanse of compacted earth, passing a water pond on the left while a distant obelisk stands prominently against a clear blue sky. As the character moves forward, the landscape shifts into a more arid environment where weathered rock formations emerge on the right and the obelisk grows larger in the frame. The scene then expands into a valley flanked by tall rocks, revealing an ancient stone structure with archways that appears ahead of the towering obelisk. Finally, the camera pushes through a narrow passage between close rock walls, approaching the entrance of the stone building as the obelisk recedes into the distance.
